action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 20 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the greenvise pulls the target 15 feet straight toward itself.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 17}, one Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the greenvise (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the greenvise, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the greenvise, and takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the greenvise's turns.

If the greenvise takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the greenvise must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the greenvise and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the greenvise dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 10 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Death Fog (1/Day)
entries: The greenvise emits a greenish, poisonous fog that fills a 30-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on itself. The fog is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} and lasts for 1 minute or until a strong wind or similar effect disperses the fog. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature within the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. A creature must also make this save when it enters the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} or ends its turn there. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved. It also can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions. The greenvise is immune to this effect.

action.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 15 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from two of ten tentacles. The target is also subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the grick's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grick makes one Beak attack, one Tail Slam attack, and one Tentacles attack.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d8 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Tail Slam
entries: {@atkr m} + 6, reach 10 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from all four tentacles.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grick makes one Beak attack and one Tentacles attack.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Small or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 10}) from all four tentacles.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The griffon makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Piercing damage, or 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Slashing damage if the griffon moved 30+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from both of the griffon's front claws.

trait.name: Fear Aura
entries: The griffon emanates an aura in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} while it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this griffon's aura for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The griffon makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from both of the griffon's front claws.

bonus.name: Sickening Smite (3/Day)
entries: Immediately after the griffon hits a creature with a melee attack, the creature takes an extra 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the griffon's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grimlock makes two attacks, using Bone Axe or Bone Javelin in any combination.

action.name: Bone Axe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Bone Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage.

trait.name: Cave Strider
entries: The grimlock ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} caused by slippery or uneven terrain in a cave or underground environment.

action.name: Bone Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Stealthy
entries: The grimlock takes the Hide action.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the grimlock's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
entries: If the grimlock fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grimlock makes two attacks, using Bone Greatclub or Bone Javelin in any combination.

action.name: Bone Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Bone Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Blood Cry {@recharge 5}
entries: The grimlock and each creature of its choice that can see or hear it has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the start of the grimlock's next turn.

legendary.name: Charge
entries: The grimlock moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Bone Greatclub attack.

legendary.name: Clobber
entries: The grimlock makes one Bone Greatclub attack. If the target is a creature and the attack hits, the target is also subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} DC
16. {@actSaveFail} the target has {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition until the start of the grimlock's next turn. The grimlock can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Hurl Javelin
entries: The grimlock makes one Bone Javelin attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The grimlock casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

action.name: Bone Cudgel
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Poison Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 120 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Poison damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the grimlock's next turn.

action.name: Rippling Earth {@recharge 5}
entries: The grimlock causes the earth in front of it to move in a sudden and violent, cascading motion. {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature standing on the ground in a 30-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 2d12 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the grimlock and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The grimlock can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Bone Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The grimlock takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

spellcasting.name: Coven Magic
headerEntries: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}): {@spell Augury|XPHB}, {@spell Find Familiar|XPHB}, {@spell Identify|XPHB}, {@spell Locate Object|XPHB}, {@spell Scrying|XPHB}, or {@spell Unseen Servant|XPHB}. The hag must finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} before using this trait to cast that spell again.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks):
will: {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} (self only, and the hag leaves no tracks while Invisible)

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The hag can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful {@dc 14} Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hag makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} (self only, and the hag leaves no tracks while {@condition Invisible|XPHB}) or {@spell Ray of Sickness|XPHB} (level 3 version).

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target's Strength score decreases by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces that score to 0.

bonus.name: Maddening Cackle {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 15}, each enemy that can hear the hag in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hag. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Psychic damage and the target must use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that the hag chooses. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

spellcasting.name: Coven Magic
headerEntries: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}): {@spell Augury|XPHB}, {@spell Find Familiar|XPHB}, {@spell Identify|XPHB}, {@spell Locate Object|XPHB}, {@spell Scrying|XPHB}, or {@spell Unseen Servant|XPHB}. The hag must finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} before using this trait to cast that spell again.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

spellcasting.name: Nightmare Haunting (1/Day; Requires Soul Bag)
headerEntries: While on the Ethereal Plane, the hag casts {@spell Dream|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Only the hag can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a creature the hag can see on the Material Plane. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the {@spell Protection from Evil and Good|XPHB} spell or within a {@spell Magic Circle|XPHB} spell.
If the target takes damage from the {@spell Dream|XPHB} spell, the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage.
If the spell kills the target, its soul is trapped in the hag's soul bag, and the target can't be raised from the dead until its soul is released.

spellcasting.name: Fiendish Rebuke (2/Day)
headerEntries: The hag casts {@spell Hellish Rebuke|XPHB} (level 3 version) in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hag has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Soul Bag
entries: The hag has a soul bag. While holding or carrying the bag, the hag can use its Nightmare Haunting action.
The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage.
The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The hag can create a new bag after 7 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hag makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Magic Missile|XPHB} (level 4 version) or {@spell Phantasmal Killer|XPHB}, if available.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. This effect ends for the target if it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

action.name: Hellfire
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the hag can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Fire damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Lulling Cackle {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 17}, each enemy that can hear the hag in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hag. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Psychic damage and the target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. This effect ends for the target if it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The hag shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

spellcasting.name: Coven Magic
headerEntries: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}): {@spell Augury|XPHB}, {@spell Find Familiar|XPHB}, {@spell Identify|XPHB}, {@spell Locate Object|XPHB}, {@spell Scrying|XPHB}, or {@spell Unseen Servant|XPHB}. The hag must finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} before using this trait to cast that spell again.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Illusory Appearance
headerEntries: The hag casts {@spell Disguise Self|XPHB}, using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}). The spell's duration is 24 hours.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The hag can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Vile Appearance
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, any Beast or Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the hag and can see the hag's true form. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this hag's Vile Appearance for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hag makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Chromatic Orb|XPHB} (level 2 version) or Death Glare, if available.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Death Glare {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, one {@condition Frightened|XPHB} creature the hag can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} If the target has 40 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.
Otherwise, the target takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Heightened Spell (4/Day)
entries: The next spell the hag casts this turn that forces a creature to make a saving throw, the hag gives one target of the spell {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on saves against the spell.

reaction.name: Confounding Cackle
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the hag can see within 30 feet of the hag attacks the hag. {@actResponse d}{@actSave cha} {@dc 15}, the triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} The hag chooses a creature within 5 feet of itself. The creature becomes the target of the attack instead. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this hag's Confounding Cackle for 24 hours.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The half-dragon can breathe air and water.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage. If target is a Medium or smaller creature and the halfdragon moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Piercing damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Acid Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 15-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The half-dragon can breathe air and water.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The half-dragon makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Poison Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The half-dragon takes the Disengage or Hide action.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the halfdragon moved 30+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition, and the half-dragon can make one Bite attack against it.

action.name: Fire Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 31 ({@damage 9d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The half-dragon makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}34 ({@damage 4d12 + 8}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't be targeted by the half-dragon's Tail.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 15 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Fire Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 59 ({@damage 17d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The harpy casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harpy makes two attacks, using Mace or Claw in any combination.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Hex Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@dice D20} Tests until the end of the harpy's next turn.

action.name: Hex Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 120 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@dice D20} Tests until the end of the harpy's next turn.

action.name: Luring Song
entries: The harpy sings a magical melody, which lasts until the harpy's {@status Concentration|XPHB} ends on it. {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, each Humanoid and Giant in a 300-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the harpy when the song starts. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies. If the target is more than 5 feet from the harpy, the target moves on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the harpy. It doesn't avoid Opportunity Attacks; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, the target repeats the save. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this harpy's Luring Song for 24 hours.

reaction.name: Vexing Screech {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the harpy can see within 30 feet of the harpy attacks the harpy. {@actResponse d}{@actSave cha} {@dc 13}, the triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Psychic damage and the creature has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the harpy's next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If the harpy's Luring Song is active, it ends immediately.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The harpy casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the harpy fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harpy makes two attacks, using Mace or Claw in any combination.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Hex Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 120 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@dice D20} Tests until the end of the harpy's next turn.

action.name: Luring Song
entries: The harpy sings a magical melody, which lasts until the harpy's {@status Concentration|XPHB} ends on it. {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, each Humanoid and Giant in a 300-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the harpy when the song starts. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies. If the target is more than 5 feet from the harpy, the target moves on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the harpy. It doesn't avoid Opportunity Attacks; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, the target repeats the save. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this harpy's Luring Song for 24 hours.

reaction.name: Vexing Screech {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the harpy can see within 30 feet of the harpy attacks the harpy. {@actResponse d}{@actSave cha} {@dc 16}, the triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Psychic damage and the creature has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the harpy's next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If the harpy's Luring Song is active, it ends immediately.

legendary.name: Exert Will
entries: One creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the harpy that can see or hear the harpy takes a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one attack against a creature chosen by the harpy.

legendary.name: Flyby
entries: The harpy flies up to half her {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks, and she makes one Claw attack.

legendary.name: Hex Bolt
entries: The harpy makes one Hex Bolt attack. The harpy can't take this action again until the start of her next turn.

legendary.name: Vexing Magic
entries: The harpy casts {@spell Bestow Curse|XPHB}, {@spell Charm Monster|XPHB} (level 5 version), or {@spell Greater Invisibility|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The harpy can't take this action again until the start of her next turn.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The warhound has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the warhound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The warhound makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the warhound moved 30+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Fire Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 24 ({@damage 7d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Battle Horror
languages: understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The battle horror has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spell Immunity
entries: The battle horror is immune to six spells chosen by its creator. Typical choices include {@spell Eldritch Blast|XPHB}, {@spell Fireball|XPHB}, {@spell Guiding Bolt|XPHB}, {@spell Heat Metal|XPHB}, {@spell Lightning Bolt|XPHB}, and {@spell Magic Missile|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The battle horror makes two Arcane Greatsword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Cleaving Swing, if available.

action.name: Arcane Sword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Slashing damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Force damage.

action.name: Cleaving Swing {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} originating from the battle horror. {@actSaveFail} 20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Slashing damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Force damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The battle horror is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The battle horror adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

reaction.name: Spell Reflection
entries: {@actTrigger} The battle horror succeeds on a saving throw against a spell, or a spell's attack roll misses it. {@actResponse d}{@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, one creature the battle horror can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Force damage.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The hippogriff doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hippogriff makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The hippogriff doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hippogriff makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Buck
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the hippogriff can see ends its turn within 5 feet of the hippogriff. {@actResponse} The hippogriff makes one Hooves attack against the creature.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hobgoblin casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

spellcasting.name: Smite (3/Day)
headerEntries: The hobgoblin casts {@spell Blinding Smite|XPHB} or {@spell Wrathful Smite|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Aura of Authority
entries: While in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Aura of Dread
entries: Creatures in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hobgoblin have their Speeds halved while in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. The hobgoblin can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura. Creatures immune to the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition are unaffected.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hobgoblin makes two Dire Longsword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Bane|XPHB} or {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 2 version).

action.name: Dire Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Wisdom saving throws until the end of the hobgoblin's next turn.

bonus.name: Dreadmaster's Presence {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, each enemy in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hobgoblin. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} and {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition until the end of the hobgoblin's next turn.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hobgoblin has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 3d4}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Lightfooted
entries: The hobgoblin takes the Dash or Disengage action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hobgoblin casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to hit with spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Shield (3/Day)
headerEntries: The hobgoblin casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hobgoblin has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hobgoblin makes two attacks, using War Pick or Chromatic Burst in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: War Pick
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Chromatic Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison damage (hobgoblin's choice).

action.name: Tiamat's Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 24 ({@damage 7d6}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison damage (hobgoblin's choice) damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Heightened Spell (3/Day)
entries: The next spell the hobgoblin casts this turn that forces a creature to make a saving throw, the hobgoblin gives one target of the spell {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on saves against the spell.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hobgoblin has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 3d4}) Poison damage.

reaction.name: Command Retaliation
entries: {@actTrigger} An attacker misses the hobgoblin with a melee attack roll. {@actResponse} One ally within 5 feet of the attacker and can see or hear the hobgoblin can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one melee attack against the attacker.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hobgoblin casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

spellcasting.name: Maglubiyet's Boon (3/Day)
headerEntries: The hobgoblin casts {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 2 version), {@spell Healing Word|XPHB}, {@spell Hold Person|XPHB}, or {@spell Revivify|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Aura of Authority
entries: While in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hobgoblin makes two attacks, using Mace or Necrotic Ray in any combination.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Necrotic Ray
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 120 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the hook horror's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hook horror makes two Hook attacks. If both attacks hit the same target, the hook horror can take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to make a Beak attack against the target.

action.name: Hook
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the hook horror moves the target 5 feet straight toward or away from itself.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the hook horror's choice (excluding itself) in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hook horror makes two Hook attacks and one Beak attack.

action.name: Hook
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, the hook horror moves the target 5 feet straight toward or away from itself.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d10 + 6}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Primal Screech (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each enemy that can hear the hook horror in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hook horror. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the hook horror's next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Up to three allies that can hear the hook horror can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} or make one melee attack.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

trait.name: Multiple Heads
entries: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 damage or more on a single turn, one of its heads dies.

The hydra dies if all its heads are dead. At the end of each of its turns when it has at least one living head, the hydra grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken Fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} when it grows new heads.

trait.name: Reactive Heads
entries: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} that can be used only for Opportunity Attacks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads. It can replace one attack with a use of Cold Breath.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Cold damage.

action.name: Cold Breath
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Cold damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The hydra can breathe air and water.

entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, any creature that starts its turn in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hydra. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this hydra's Stench for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hydra makes two Tentacle attacks and as many Bite attacks as it has heads. It can replace both Tentacle attacks with a use of Tentacle Slam.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d10 + 6}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. Whenever the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 19}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) and doesn't return to normal until the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition ends on the target. {@actSaveSuccess} The {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition ends.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two tentacles.

action.name: Tentacle Slam
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the hydra. {@actSaveFail} 19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the hydra's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The jackalwere has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackalwere's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The jackalwere makes two Rend or Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Beguile, Sleep Gaze, or Spellcasting.

action.name: Rend (Jackal or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic {@variantrule Damage|XPHB}.

action.name: Slam (Human or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic {@variantrule Damage|XPHB}.

action.name: Beguile
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}, one creature the jackalwere can see within 30 feet of it. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage and the target must use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make an attack against a creature other than itself that the jackalwere chooses.

Constructs, Undead, and creatures immune to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition succeed on the save automatically. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this jackalwere's Beguile for 24 hours.

action.name: Sleep Gaze {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, one creature the jackalwere can see within 30 feet (Constructs and Undead succeed automatically). {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 10 minutes or until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this jackalwere's Sleep Gaze for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The jackalwere shape-shifts into a Medium human or a Medium jackal-humanoid hybrid, or it returns to its true form (that of a Small jackal). Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

reaction.name: Misty Retreat (2/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} The jackalwere takes damage. {@actResponse} The jackalwere casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The kenku can mimic any sounds it has heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful {@dc 14} Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) check.

entries: Allies of the kenku in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it that have less {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} than the kenku have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The kenku makes two Shadow Blade attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Packmaster's Strike.

action.name: Shadow Blade
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Necrotic damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}. {@hom}The blade magically returns to the kenku's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

action.name: Packmaster's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the kenku can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one melee attack at a target the kenku chooses. If the attack hits and the target isn't larger than the ally, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The kenku takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

legendary.name: Command Minion
entries: The kenku uses Packmaster's Strike.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The kenku moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Shadow Blade attack.

bonus.name: Stunning Strike (2/Day)
entries: Immediately after the kenku deals damage to a target with an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} attack. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the kenku's next turn.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The kobold has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kobold has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack

entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d8 + 2}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison damage (kobold's choice).

entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 24 ({@damage 7d6}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison damage (kobold's choice). {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

entries: The kobold has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kobold has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Tiamat's Flame

action.name: Tiamat's Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison damage (kobold's choice). {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Young Kraken
languages: and Primordial but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The kraken can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the kraken fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The kraken makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Fling, Lightning Strike, or Swallow.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13}, reach 20 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d6 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Fling
entries: The kraken throws a Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Lightning Strike
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns.

If the kraken takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a {@dc 21} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 10 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Storm Bolt
entries: The kraken uses Lightning Strike.

legendary.name: Toxic Ink
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the kraken while it is underwater. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} conditions until the end of the kraken's next turn. The kraken then moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The kraken can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Pincer Staff
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Lightning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). Until the grapple ends, the kuo-toa can't make Pincer Staff attacks.

action.name: Conjure Slimy Glob
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 60 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d4 + 3}) Acid damage.

action.name: Harpoon
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the kuo-toa pulls the target up to 10 feet straight toward itself.

action.name: Sticky Net (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 10}, one Large or smaller creature the kuo-toa can see within 15 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the net is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage). A creature can take an action to make a {@dc 10} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check to free itself or another creature in a net within 5 feet, destroying the net on a success.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

bonus.name: Shocking Strike {@recharge 5}
entries: Immediately after the kuo-toa deals lightning damage to a target with a Bone Whip attack.

bonus.name: Constitution Saving Throw:
entries: {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Lightning damage and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

reaction.name: Snagging Whip
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the kuo-toa can see moves within 30 feet of the kuo-toa. {@actResponse} The kuo-toa makes a Bone Whip attack against the creature. If the attack hits, the creature has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, one creature the kuo-toa can see within 30 feet (Constructs and Undead succeed automatically). {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage and the target is suffocating. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this kuo-toa's Drowning {@variantrule Curses|XPHB|Curse} for 24 hours.

reaction.name: Tidal Rebuke {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet of the kuo-toa that the kuo-toa can see damages the kuotoa. {@actResponse d}{@actSave str} {@dc 13}, the triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Force damage and the creature is pushed up to 30 feet away from the kuo-toa and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

entries: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

entries: If destroyed, the lich reforms in {@dice 1d10} days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the lich's lair.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lich makes three attacks, using Eldritch Burst or Pain Touch in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Grasp of Death, if available.

action.name: Eldritch Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}31 ({@damage 4d12 + 5}) Force damage.

entries: The lich casts {@spell Divine Word|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Deathly Teleport
entries: The lich teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage.

legendary.name: Oppressive Magic
entries: The lich casts {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 3 version), {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Fear|XPHB}, or {@spell Hold Person|XPHB} (level 3 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Grasp of Death
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, one creature the lich can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} If the target has 50 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Otherwise, the target takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting

spellcasting.name: Fiendish Rebuke (3/Day)
headerEntries: The lich casts {@spell Hellish Rebuke|XPHB} (level 5 version) in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

headerEntries: The lich casts {@spell Fear|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Dark One's Own Luck (3/Day)
entries: When the lich makes an ability check or saving throw, it can add {@dice 1d10} to the roll. It can do so after seeing the roll but before any of the roll's effects occur.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Spirit Jar
entries: If destroyed, the lich reforms in {@dice 1d10} days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the lich's lair.

action.name: Eldritch Flame
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Fire damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Force damage.

action.name: Hellfire
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, each creature in a 20-footradius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the lich can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Fire damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendary.name: Deathly Teleport
entries: The lich teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage.

legendary.name: Dark Hunger
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, each creature that isn't a Construct or Undead in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the lich. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The lich regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the Necrotic damage dealt. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

entries: The lizardfolk makes two attacks, using Heavy Club or Javelin in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite or Overhead Smash, if available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't a Construct or an Undead, the lizardfolk gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the damage dealt.

action.name: Javelin

1/Day Each: {@spell Charm Monster|XPHB}, {@spell Dimension Door|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Globe of Invulnerability|XPHB}, {@spell Synaptic Static|XPHB}, {@spell Vitriolic Sphere|XPHB}

bonus.name: Petrifying Gaze {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. If the medusa sees its reflection in the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}, the medusa must make this save. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFail 2} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Ancient Magic
entries: The medusa uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Detect Thoughts|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Lightning Bolt|XPHB}, {@spell Minor Illusion|XPHB}, Mirror

legendary.name: Image, or Thunderwave (level 2 version)
entries: The medusa can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Animate Statue
entries: The medusa targets one Large or smaller {@condition Petrified|XPHB} creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The {@condition Petrified|XPHB} creature turns into an animated stone statue (p. 16). The statue is an ally to the medusa. In combat, the statue shares the medusa's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after the medusa The medusa can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Shoot
entries: The medusa makes one Longbow attack.

legendary.name: Squeeze
entries: The medusa moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it uses Constrict.

spellcasting.name: Divine Aid (3/Day)
headerEntries: The merfolk casts {@spell Bless|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Healing Word|XPHB}, or {@spell Lesser Restoration|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The merfolk makes two Radiant Burst attacks.

action.name: Radiant Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) Radiant damage.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

action.name: Ocean Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Cold damage. If the target is a creature, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn. {@hom}The spear magically returns to the merfolk's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

bonus.name: Lightfooted
entries: The merfolk takes the Dash or Disengage action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The merfolk casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

entries: The merfolk makes two Storm Chill attacks.

action.name: Storm Chill
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Cold damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Tidal Blast {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 10 feet straight away from the merfolk and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The merrow can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: The merrow's attack rolls and Unarmed Strikes can score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The merrow makes two attacks, using Bite, Claw, or Harpoon in any combination. It also makes one Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the merrow's next turn.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the merrow's next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Harpoon
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the merrow pulls the target up to 15 feet straight toward itself.

bonus.name: Second Wind (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The merrow regains 25 ({@dice 1d10 + 20}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

entries: The merrow can breathe air and water.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Shock Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 120 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Shock Sphere {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the merrow can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
entries: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mimic makes one Bite attack and one Pseudopod attack. It can replace its Bite attack with an Acid Spit attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the mimic), reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage—or 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Piercing damage if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the mimic—plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Acid damage.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Acid Spit
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 120 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Acid damage.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The mimic shape-shifts to resemble a Large object while retaining its game statistics, or it returns to its true blob form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 20 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 3d8 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Acid Spit

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The mimic shape-shifts to resemble a Huge object while retaining its game statistics, or it returns to its true blob form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, one Medium or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the mimic (the mimic can have only one creature swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The mimic swallows the target, which is no longer {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. While swallowed, a creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the mimic, and takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Acid damage at the start of each of the mimic's turns.

If the mimic takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the mimic must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls in a space within 15 feet of the mimic and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the mimic dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the mind flayer is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the mind flayer instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mind flayer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mind flayer makes one Psychic Blade attack and one Tentacles attack.

action.name: Psychic Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Psychic damage, and the mind flayer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes against the target before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Psychic damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from all the mind flayer's tentacles, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Extract Brain
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature that is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the mind flayer's Tentacles. {@actSaveFail} 55 ({@damage 10d10}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If this damage reduces the target to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the mind flayer kills it and devours its brain.

entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 31 ({@damage 6d8 + 4}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the mind flayer's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

spellcasting.name: Nightmare Haunting (1/Day; Requires Soul Bag)
headerEntries: While on the Ethereal Plane, the oni casts {@spell Dream|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Only the oni can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a creature the oni can see on the Material Plane. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the {@spell Protection from Evil and Good|XPHB} spell or within a {@spell Magic Circle|XPHB} spell.
If the target takes damage from the {@spell Dream|XPHB} spell, the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage.
If the spell kills the target, its soul is trapped in the oni's soul bag, and the target can't be raised from the dead until its soul is released.

headerEntries: The oni casts {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The oni regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

trait.name: Soul Bag
entries: The oni has a soul bag. While holding or carrying the bag, the oni can use its Nightmare Haunting action.
The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage.
The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The oni can create a new bag after 7 days.

entries: The oni makes one Nightmare Ray attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The oni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

spellcasting.name: Invisibility
headerEntries: The oni casts {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The oni regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

trait.name: Vile Appearance
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, any Beast or Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the oni and can see the oni's true form. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this oni's Vile Appearance for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The oni makes two Claw or Nightmare Ray attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Strangling Tresses or Spellcasting.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Nightmare Ray
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 60 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of the oni's next turn.

action.name: Strangling Tresses
entries: The oni's hair extends to grab a foe. {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, one Medium or smaller creature the oni can see within 15 feet. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends. The oni can pull the target up to 10 feet straight toward it.

action.name: Death Glare {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one {@condition Frightened|XPHB} creature the oni can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} If the target has 40 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.
Otherwise, the target takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The oni shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Large Giant, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

trait.name: Corrosive Form
entries: A creature that hits the pudding with a melee attack roll takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Acid damage. Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the pudding and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the pudding and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the {@spell Mending|XPHB} spell on the weapon.
In 1 minute, the pudding can eat through 2 feet of nonmagical wood or metal.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The pudding makes two Dissolving Pseudopod attacks.

action.name: Dissolving Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 15 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 6d6 + 5}) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the {@spell Mending|XPHB} spell on the armor.

reaction.name: Split
entries: {@actTrigger} While the pudding is Huge, Medium, or Small and has 10+ {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it becomes {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or is subjected to Lightning or Slashing damage. {@actResponse} The pudding splits into two new Black Puddings. Each new pudding is one size smaller than the original pudding and acts on its {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}. The original pudding's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are divided evenly between the new puddings (round down).

trait.name: Ooze Cube
entries: The cube fills its entire space and is transparent.
Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the cube's Engulf and has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the saving throw.
Creatures inside the cube have {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover}, and the cube can hold one Huge creature, four Large creatures, or up to eight Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time.

As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can pull a creature or an object out of the cube by succeeding on a {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check, and the puller takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Transparent
entries: Even when the cube is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom ({@skill Perception|XPHB}) check to notice the cube if the creature hasn't witnessed the cube move or otherwise act.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The pudding makes two Pseudopod attacks.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Acid damage.

action.name: Engulf
entries: The cube moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking

action.name: Opportunity Attacks
entries: The cube can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the Ooze {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} trait). {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature whose space the cube enters for the first time during this move. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, and takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the cube's turns. When the cube moves, the engulfed target moves with it. An engulfed target can try to escape by taking an action to make a {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check. On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead.
