entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 feet. {@h}2 Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the ant's next turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The bug can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Proboscis
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage, the bug attaches to the target, and the target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. While attached, the bug can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the bug's turns. The bug can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the bug with an action.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The bullfrog can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The bullfrog's {@variantrule Long Jump|XPHB} is up to 30 feet and its {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB} is up to 15 feet with or without a running start.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}).

action.name: Swallow
entries: The bullfrog swallows a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't {@condition Grappled|XPHB} but has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, and it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the bullfrog. While swallowing the target, the bullfrog can't use Bite or Tongue, and if the bullfrog dies, the swallowed target is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

At the end of the bullfrog's next turn, the swallowed target takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Acid damage. If that damage doesn't kill it, the bullfrog disgorges it, causing it to exit {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Tongue
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 15 ft. {@h}If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the bullfrog pulls the target 10 feet straight toward itself.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The caecilia can breathe air and water.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}).

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 13}, one Medium or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the caecilia (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the caecilia, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the caecilia, and takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the caecilia's turns.

If the caecilia takes 10 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the caecilia must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the caecilia and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the caecilia dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the leech attaches to the target. While attached, the leech can't make Bite attacks, the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 13}), and the target takes 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the leech's turns. The leech can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement.

entries: The mantis can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 15 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the mantis. {@actSaveFail} 15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The slug can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Rasp
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}).

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}, one Medium or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the slug (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the slug, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the slug, and takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the slug's turns.

If the slug takes 15 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the slug must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the slug and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the slug dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Proboscis
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage, the fly attaches to the target, and the target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} DC

11. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.
While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

While attached, the fly can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the fly's turns. The fly can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the fly with an action.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Spit Poison
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 20/60 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the cobra's next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}).

bonus.name: Lightfooted
entries: The beetle takes the Dash or Disengage action.

entries: The tarantula can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Urticating Hairs (Recharges after a Long Rest)
entries: The tarantula flicks the barbed hairs from its abdomen. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the tarantula. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

action.name: Bite

While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't be targeted by the hatori's Tail.

A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the hatori, and it takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the hatori's turns.

If the hatori takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the hatori must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the hatori and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the hatori dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Bite

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from all eight tentacles. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Ink Cloud (1/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} The octopus takes damage while underwater. {@actResponse} The octopus releases ink that fills a 15- foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB}. The {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

action.name: Sting

headerEntries: The guard casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (2/Day)
headerEntries: The guard casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The guard makes two attacks, using Longsword or Sorcerous Burst in any combination.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Force damage.

entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 120 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Psychic, or Thunder damage (guard's choice).

bonus.name: Quickened Spell (2/Day)
entries: The guard uses Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (2/Day)
headerEntries: The knight casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

entries: The knight uses Spellcasting.

reaction.name: Parry

headerEntries: The druid casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The druid makes two attacks, using Blight Scythe or Blight Bolt in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Blight Scythe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the druid's next turn.

action.name: Blight Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 120 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Blight Wave {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the druid. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the druid's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Protection
entries: {@actTrigger} An attacker the bodyguard can see makes an attack roll against an ally within 5 feet of the bodyguard. {@actResponse} The bodyguard imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bodyguard makes two Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Lightfooted
entries: The bodyguard takes the Dash or Disengage action.

reaction.name: Self-Sacrifice
entries: {@actTrigger} An ally the bodyguard can see is hit by an attack. {@actResponse} The bodyguard and that ally swap places, and the bodyguard becomes the target of the attack instead.

spellcasting.name: Hunter's Mark (2/Day)
headerEntries: The bounty hunter casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Nonlethal Strike
entries: When the bounty hunter reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with an attack, it can instead choose to reduce the creature to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and give it the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition. It then starts a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, at the end of which that condition ends on it. The condition ends early if the creature regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or if someone takes an action to administer first aid to it, making a successful {@dc 10} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine|XPHB}) check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bounty hunter makes two attacks, using Shortsword or Light Crossbow in any combination.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by half until the start of the bounty hunter's next turn.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by half until the start of the bounty hunter's next turn.

headerEntries: The bounty hunter casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Nonlethal Strike
entries: When the bounty hunter reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with an attack, it can instead choose to reduce the creature to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and give it the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition. It then starts a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, at the end of which that condition ends on it. The condition ends early if the creature regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or if someone takes an action to administer first aid to it, making a successful {@dc 10} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine|XPHB}) check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bounty hunter makes three attacks, using Shortsword or Light Crossbow in any combination.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by half until the start of the bounty hunter's next turn.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by half until the start of the bounty hunter's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The captain makes two attacks, using Longsword or Light Crossbow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Commander's Strike or Maneuver Allies, if available.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the captain can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the captain chooses, adding 4 ({@dice 1d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

action.name: Maneuver Allies {@recharge 5}
entries: Each ally within 30 feet of the captain can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The whisperer casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The whisperer makes two attacks, using Rapier or Befuddling Bolt in any combination.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, and the whisperer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes against the target before the end of this turn.

action.name: Befuddling Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 90 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws until the end of the whisperer's next turn.

bonus.name: Dark Whispers
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, a creature the whisperer can see within 30 feet and can hear the whisperer. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage and has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of the whisperer's next turn.

The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that the whisperer mentally chooses. The target can act normally on its turn if the whisperer chooses no creature or if no creature is within its reach. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this whisperer's Dark Whispers for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The priest makes two Necrotic Burst attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Bestow Curse|XPHB}, {@spell Ray of Enfeeblement|XPHB}, or {@spell Vampiric Touch|XPHB}.

action.name: Necrotic Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Necrotic damage and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Pillar of Death {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} centered on a point the priest can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Necrotic damage and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Befuddling Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 90 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws until the end of the divine trickster's next turn.

entries: {@actTrigger} The divine trickster takes damage. {@actResponse} The divine trickster casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The dread lord casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

spellcasting.name: Dreadful Word (1/Day)
headerEntries: The dread lord casts {@spell Divine Word|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Aura of Dread
entries: Creatures in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dread lord have their Speeds halved while in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. The dread lord can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura. Creatures immune to the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition are unaffected.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the dread lord fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dread lord makes two attacks, using Dreadful Morningstar or Dreadful Bolt in any combination.

action.name: Dreadful Morningstar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition), reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the dread lord's next turn.

action.name: Dreadful Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition), range 120 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the dread lord's next turn.

legendary.name: Dreadful Bolt
entries: The dread lord makes one Dreadful Bolt attack.

legendary.name: Dreadful Charge
entries: The dread lord moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Dreadful Morningstar attack.

legendary.name: Dreadful Magic
entries: The dread lord uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 3 version), {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Fear|XPHB}, and {@spell Hold Person|XPHB} (level 3 version). The dread lord can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The dreadmaster casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

spellcasting.name: Smite (3/Day)
headerEntries: The dreadmaster casts {@spell Blinding Smite|XPHB} or {@spell Staggering Smite|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Aura of Dread
entries: Creatures in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dreadmaster have their Speeds halved while in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. The dreadmaster can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura. Creatures immune to the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition are unaffected.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dreadmaster makes three attacks, using Dire Longsword or Dire Bolt in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Commander's Strike or Spellcasting to cast {@spell Bane|XPHB}, {@spell Command|XPHB}, or {@spell Hold Person|XPHB}.

action.name: Dire Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Wisdom saving throws until the end of the dreadmaster's next turn.

action.name: Dire Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 120 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Wisdom saving throws until the end of the dreadmaster's next turn.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the dreadmaster can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the dreadmaster chooses, adding 9 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

bonus.name: Dreadmaster's Presence {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, each enemy in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dreadmaster. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} and {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition until the end of the dreadmaster's next turn.

spellcasting.name: Hunter's Mark (2/Day)
headerEntries: The foe hunter casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The foe hunter makes two attacks, using Longsword or Longbow in any combination.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage, or 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage if the target doesn't have all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage, or 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage if the target doesn't have all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The priest casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Auril's Aid (3/Day)
headerEntries: The priest casts {@spell Armor of Agathys|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Healing Word|XPHB}, or {@spell Sleet Storm|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The priest makes two attacks, using Frost Pick or Frost Ray in any combination.

action.name: Frost Pick
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage.

action.name: Frost Ray
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 120 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage.

action.name: Winter's Bloom {@recharge 5}
entries: The priest conjures an explosion of freezing, ice shards. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the priest can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Cold damage, and the target is partially encased in ice. The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the ice encasing it is destroyed (AC 10; HP 20; {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Poison and Psychic damage). {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hexblade casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

spellcasting.name: Shield (2/Day)
headerEntries: The hexblade casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hexblade makes two attacks, using Scimitar or Hex Bolt in any combination.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Hex Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 120 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@dice D20} Tests until the end of the hexblade's next turn.

bonus.name: Hexblade's Curse {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, One creature the hexblade can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed for 1 minute. Until the curse ends, the target is Vulnerable to the hexblade's melee attack damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The hex knight casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

spellcasting.name: Shield (3/Day)
headerEntries: The hex knight casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If hex knight fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hex knight makes two attacks, using Scimitar or Hex Bolt in any combination.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Hex Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 120 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@dice D20} Tests until the end of the hex knight's next turn.

bonus.name: Hexblade's Curse {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, One creature the hex knight can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed for 1 minute. Until the curse ends, the target is Vulnerable to the hex knight's melee attack damage.

legendary.name: Bolt
entries: The hex knight makes one Hex Bolt attack.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The hex knight moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Scimitar attack.

legendary.name: Hex Magic
entries: The hex knight uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Crown of Madness|XPHB}, {@spell Darkness|XPHB}, {@spell Mind Spike|XPHB}, {@spell Mirror Image|XPHB}, or {@spell Ray of Enfeeblement|XPHB}. The hex knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The inquisitor casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

spellcasting.name: Smite (3/Day)
headerEntries: The inquisitor casts {@spell Banishing Smite|XPHB}, {@spell Blinding Smite|XPHB} (level 4 version), {@spell Staggering Smite|XPHB}, or {@spell Wrathful Smite|XPHB} (level 4 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

entries: If inquisitor fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Dire Flail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Wisdom saving throws until the end of the inquisitor's next turn.

action.name: Glare of Reckoning
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, one creature the inquisitor can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the inquisitor's next turn. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB} in this way, the creature has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Charge
entries: The inquisitor moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Dire Flail attack.

legendary.name: Castigating Magic
entries: The inquisitor uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 2 version), {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Fear|XPHB}, or {@spell Hold Person|XPHB}.
The inquisitor can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the marshal's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marshal makes three attacks, using Longsword or Light Crossbow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Commander's Strike or Maneuver Allies, if available.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the marshal can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the marshal chooses, adding 9 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

action.name: Maneuver Allies {@recharge 5}
entries: Each ally within 30 feet of the marshal can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

bonus.name: Rallying Call (1/Day)
entries: Up to three allies of the marshal that can see or hear it gain 10 ({@dice 1d10 + 5}) {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 2}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d8}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the sergeant can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the sergeant chooses, adding 4 ({@dice 1d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

action.name: Maneuver Allies {@recharge 5}
entries: Each ally within 30 feet of the sergeant can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the shadow fist is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the shadow fist instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

entries: The shadow fist makes two attacks, using Sai or Dart in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting or Shadow Spike, if available.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Dart
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Shadow Spike {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, one creature within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the shadow fist's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The shadow fist takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

bonus.name: Shadow Step
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the shadow fist teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see that is in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

entries: While {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the skald has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage.

entries: {@actTrigger} An enemy that the skald can see and can hear and understand the skald makes a {@dice D20} Test roll. {@actResponse} The skald imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the {@dice D20} Test roll.

trait.name: Skirmish Advantage
entries: Immediately after ending its movement

15+ feet from the space it started its turn, the skirmisher has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its turn. The skirmisher can only gain this {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} once per turn.

action.name: Warhammer

entries: {@actTrigger} An enemy creature the priest can see moves within 30 feet of the priest. {@actResponse d}{@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, the triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack

1/Day Each: {@spell Call Lightning|XPHB}, {@spell Ice Storm|XPHB}, {@spell Shatter|XPHB}

entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}, each creature and each object that isn't being worn or carried in a 30-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Thunder damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, the target is pushed up to 30 feet straight away from the shaman and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only

entries: When the sorcerer casts {@spell Cacophonic Shield|FRHoF}, {@spell Lightning Bolt|XPHB}, {@spell Shatter|XPHB}, or {@spell Thunderwave|XPHB}, all other creatures within 10 feet of the sorcerer each take 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Lightning damage.
